name: Bread Stuffing or Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 Garlic clove (1/2 tsp dried garlic powder)
2 tbsp Parsley leaves or 2 tsp dry parsley
1 cup Hot water or turkey broth
1/2 tsp Dried thyme or 1/4 tsp dried thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and toss to mix well.
2. Stuff into a 10-pound turkey or 4 cornish hens (4-6 servings).
3. Bake at 350°F to 375°F for 30 minutes.
4. Remove from oven and let cool before serving.
(No changes were made to the instructions section as it was clear and complete.)
